commitMessage: bober(sprint-28): config migration + opt-in local-only telemetry + spec completion

criteriaResults.evidence: Schema back-compat: TelemetrySectionSchema added to BoberConfigSchema (src/config/schema.ts:282-310) as optional. 4 new backcompat tests in tests/config/graph-schema.test.ts (15/15 pass). Existing bober.config.json parses with telemetry=undefined.
src/cli/commands/config.ts: registerConfigCommand with 'bober config migrate' + --dry-run. Creates .bak backup. Registered in src/cli/index.ts. 4 tests in config.test.ts.

src/telemetry/emit.ts: emit() with per-filepath Promise-chain mutex, mode-0600 JSONL append. All 9 EventTypes. 8 tests in tests/telemetry/emit.test.ts including no-op-when-disabled (100 calls, zero bytes) and 50 concurrent emits.

eslint.config.js: no-restricted-imports rule for src/telemetry/** blocking node:http/https/net/tls/dgram/undici/got/axios/node-fetch + no-restricted-globals fetch. Validated by writing a test file that imports 'http' → ESLint errors as expected.

Every emit call site uses only TelemetryEventData fields (IDs/counts/enums). sprint-pass: {runId, sprintId, iteration, outcome}; sprint-fail-retry: {runId, sprintId, iteration, retryCount}; agent-spawn: {agentName, contractId}; incident-resolved: {incidentId, durationMs}; incident-aborted: {incidentId}. Privacy test in emit.test.ts asserts no user-content strings reach the JSONL.
VISION.md lines 347-351: telemetry config reference table. AGENTS.md line 136: 'Telemetry Guarantee' H2 section documenting opt-in/local-only invariants.

.bober/specs/spec-20260524-bober-vision.json: status='completed' (line 10), completedAt='2026-05-25T13:30:00Z'. history.jsonl: spec-completed event appended. progress.md: Sprint 28 [completed], Tier 4 COMPLETE block + Spec Completion Summary added.
Full sweep: typecheck (0), lint (0), build (0), test (82 files, 1115 passed, 4 skipped). Sprint 27 regression: tests/e2e/four-modes.test.ts 11/11 pass in 726ms.

filesChanged.description: Added TelemetrySectionSchema (enabled: bool default false) + telemetry on BoberConfigSchema
emit() with mutex + mode-0600 JSONL append, no-op when disabled, 9 EventTypes
Sprint 28 + Tier 4 COMPLETE + Spec Completion Summary

notes: Privacy invariant verified by code review of every emit() call site — only IDs/counts/enums passed. Back-compat verified by tests/config/graph-schema.test.ts:231 (existing bober.config.json parses cleanly with new schema). Egress guard verified by ESLint test on src/telemetry/_egress-check.ts (deleted after verification). Four-modes e2e regression test passes after all changes. Spec status flipped to 'completed' on first 10 lines of spec JSON. The generator also performed the spec-completion ritual as instructed.
